error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
referral_text: 👥 Referral Program Invite friends and earn rewards! Your link: %s Total referrals: %d Total earned: $%.2f
support_welcome: 📞 Customer Support Please describe your problem or ask a question. Our team will get back to you soon.
paysupport_welcome: 🆘 Payment Support If you have a question about a purchase or payment, please contact us and include your order number. Telegram Support can't help with purchases made through this bot — we handle those requests directly.
terms_text: 📄 Terms and Conditions By paying for an order, you confirm that you reviewed the product description and agree to the purchase terms. If you need help with a payment or your order, use /paysupport or the support button on the payment screen. For disputes or refunds, contact us directly — we process those requests ourselves.
start_welcome:
👋 Welcome to the shop!

Browse our catalog, add items to your cart and pay with Telegram Stars or crypto (USDT).

Choose an action:
help_text:
📋 Available commands:

/start — Main menu
/catalog — Product catalog
/search <query> — Search products
/cart — Cart
/orders — My orders
/wishlist — Wishlist
/support — Customer support
/paysupport — Payment help
/terms — Terms and conditions
/cancel — Cancel current action
/help — Command list
category_no_products: No products available in this category
promo_not_found: ❌ Promo code not found or expired. Go back to the cart and try again.
promo_already_used: ❌ You have already used this promo code.
promo_category_mismatch: ❌ This promo code applies only to certain product categories.
promo_expired: ❌ Promo code is no longer available. Check your cart and try again.
promo_pending_order: ❌ You already have an unpaid order with this promo code.
order_created_no_crypto: 💡 CryptoBot is not configured in this environment, so only Telegram Stars payment is available.
order_already_paid: ❌ This order can no longer be paid.
order_create_error: Error creating order. Please try again later.
payment_success:
✅ Payment for order #%d was successful!

Thank you for your purchase!
payment_error: Error creating payment. Please try again later.
crypto_unavailable: 💎 CryptoBot payment is not available right now. Try Telegram Stars or contact the administrator.
crypto_pay_title: 💎 Pay order #%d Amount: $%.2f USDT Click the button below to pay:
search_too_short:
🔍 Enter at least 2 characters to search.
Example: /search shoes
error_load_catalog: ❌ Failed to load catalog. Please try again later.
error_load_cart: ❌ Failed to load cart. Please try again later.
error_load_orders: ❌ Failed to load orders. Please try again later.
error_load_product: ❌ Failed to load product. Please try again later.
error_load_profile: ❌ Failed to load profile. Please try again later.
error_add_cart: ❌ Failed to add item. Please try again later.
error_remove_cart: ❌ Failed to remove item. Please try again later.
error_promo_check: ❌ Error checking promo code. Please try again later.
profile_not_init: Profile not yet initialised. Send /start and try again.
onboarding_greeting_with_referral: 👋 Hi, %s! Welcome to our shop. You haven't placed an order yet — maybe it's time? 🎁 Loyalty Program: • Bronze → Silver → Gold → VIP • Cashback from 1%% to 10%% in bonus points 👥 Referral Program: Invite friends and earn bonuses for each one! Your referral link: %s Check out the catalog — something is waiting for you 🛍
onboarding_greeting: 👋 Hi, %s! Welcome to our shop. You haven't placed an order yet — maybe it's time? 🎁 Loyalty Program: • Bronze → Silver → Gold → VIP • Cashback from 1%% to 10%% in bonus points Check out the catalog — something is waiting for you 🛍
wishlist_price_drop: 📉 Price dropped! %s Was: $%.2f → Now: $%.2f (−%.0f%%) The item in your wishlist is waiting for you!
wishlist_back_in_stock: ✅ Back in stock! %s Hurry — only %d left.
stars_receipt: ✅ PAID --- ID: #%d TOTAL: %d Stars DATE: %s --- Thank you for your purchase!
loyalty_vip_gift: 🎁 A VIP gift has been sent to you!
